creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg Veldman from comment #23)

I personally like the idea of fallback to GTK2, and we probably need to keep "experimental" note with GTK3.  We can call for help on -x11 and/or -gnome lists.

Updating this port solves CVE-2018-6871 so it's really good to have a working one in the ports tree and on pkg.freebsd.org.
